name: Dog Fest Lamb Medallions 55G
description: Chewy medallions are made of farm lamb. A perfect size for smaller breeds. These mouth-watering dog treats are high in protein and easy to chew. Aren't they just perfect? Composition: lamb, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 30, crude fat 5.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 23.
